# dokku_app_scale (Resource)

Manages process scaling on a Dokku app (`dokku ps:scale`).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String)
- `scale` (Map of Number) Map of process type (e.g. web, worker) to desired replica count.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
